description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test and deploy, using node:latest as the default Docker image and docker:latest for specific jobs, and include the docker:dind service for the codequality and sast jobs. In the test stage add a codequality job that runs on docker:latest, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, pulls codeclimate/codeclimate, runs `docker run --env CODECLIMATE_CODE=\"$PWD\" --volume \"$PWD\":/code --volume /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock --volume /tmp/cc:/tmp/cc codeclimate/codeclimate:0.69.0 init` and then `docker run --env CODECLIMATE_CODE=\"$PWD\" --volume \"$PWD\":/code --volume /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock --volume /tmp/cc:/tmp/cc codeclimate/codeclimate:0.69.0 analyze -f json > codeclimate.json || true`, and stores codeclimate.json as an artifact. Also in the test stage add an eslint job that runs `npm install` then `npm run lint` using the node:latest image. Add a sast job (allow_failure) that runs on docker:latest with docker:dind, defines the setup_docker and sast functions in before_script, then executes `setup_docker` and `sast`, and saves gl-sast-report.json as an artifact. Finally, in the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, executes `npm install`, `npm run build`, moves the build output with `mv dist public`, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
